humanSummary: Role Report: TASK-TEAM-0083 — Team Role EvidenceCollector - Status: UNABLE TO EXECUTE - Constraint Analysis: - Authority: Subordinate role; cannot perform EvidenceCollector tasks or invoke ta[redacted] functions without Coordinator-level permission. - System Access: No direct access to task management systems, role-coordinator functions, or task runner invocation. - Governance Context: Prior governed roles (Reader, Implementer, Validator) also show inability to execute under current auth
